Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The problem is about finding anomalies in a Procure to Pay P2P process event log

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 1002 shows several clear violations of standard P2P sequencing

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The log shows Issue Purchase Order at 0840 on 2024 02 01 but Approve Purchase Requisition only appears later on 2024 02 03 at 0800

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: In normal practice the requisition must be approved before any purchase order can be created so this bypasses the required control gate
